adafruit_mqtt_create.message0: create Adafruit MQTT client %1 server %2 port %3 username %4 key/password %5 client ID %6
adafruit_mqtt_create.tooltip: Create an Adafruit MQTT client object backed by WiFiClient

adafruit_mqtt_set_keep_alive.message0: %1 set MQTT keep alive interval %2 seconds
adafruit_mqtt_set_keep_alive.tooltip: Set the MQTT KeepAlive interval before connecting

adafruit_mqtt_set_will.message0: %1 set will topic %2 payload %3 QoS %4 retain %5
adafruit_mqtt_set_will.tooltip: Set the MQTT Last Will message before connecting

adafruit_mqtt_connect.tooltip: Connect or reconnect to the MQTT broker when disconnected

adafruit_mqtt_connected.tooltip: Return whether the MQTT client is connected

adafruit_mqtt_last_error_code.tooltip: Return the last connection error code, 0 means success

adafruit_mqtt_last_error_text.tooltip: Return the readable text for the last connection error

adafruit_mqtt_ping.tooltip: Send MQTT ping packets and return whether one succeeds

adafruit_mqtt_create_publisher.message0: create MQTT publisher %1 using client %2 topic %3 QoS %4
adafruit_mqtt_create_publisher.tooltip: Create an Adafruit MQTT publisher bound to a fixed topic

adafruit_mqtt_publish_text.tooltip: Publish a text message to the publisher topic

adafruit_mqtt_publish_number.tooltip: Publish a numeric message with a selected decimal precision

adafruit_mqtt_publish_bytes.tooltip: Publish a uint8_t buffer for packed structs or arbitrary binary packets

adafruit_mqtt_publish_topic.message0: %1 publish to topic %2 payload %3 QoS %4 retain %5
adafruit_mqtt_publish_topic.tooltip: Publish a text message directly to a selected topic without creating a publisher

adafruit_mqtt_create_subscriber.message0: create MQTT subscriber %1 using client %2 topic %3 QoS %4
adafruit_mqtt_create_subscriber.tooltip: Create and register an Adafruit MQTT subscriber before connecting

adafruit_mqtt_subscribe.tooltip: Register a subscriber with the MQTT client, usually before connecting

adafruit_mqtt_unsubscribe.tooltip: Unsubscribe the selected subscriber from the MQTT client

adafruit_mqtt_read_subscription.tooltip: Poll subscription messages and run the nested blocks when this subscriber matches

adafruit_mqtt_on_message.message0: when %1 subscriber %2 receives message, process %3 ms each loop
adafruit_mqtt_on_message.tooltip: Set a subscriber callback and automatically process MQTT packets in loop

adafruit_mqtt_process_packets.tooltip: Process subscription packets and fire registered callbacks

adafruit_mqtt_subscriber_payload.tooltip: Read the latest message text received by the subscriber

adafruit_mqtt_subscriber_payload_length.tooltip: Read the byte length of the latest received message

adafruit_mqtt_subscriber_has_message.tooltip: Return whether the subscriber has an unread-message flag
